<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-2_chunk007.pdf#page=4 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-2 p306 -->

== RESIDENZ ==

== VIERSCHIMMELSAAL ==

[[File:Band03-2_chunk007_p004_img001.jpg|thumb|yenus △ VI Insite]]


[[File:Band03-2_chunk007_p004_img002.jpg|thumb]]


[[File:Band03-2_chunk007_p004_img003.jpg|thumb]]


[[File:Band03-2_chunk007_p004_img004.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-2 p307 -->
